title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at Hindustan Unilever Global Group

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at Hindustan Unilever Global Group
jsonLd.description:
We at Hindustan Unilever Global Group are looking for an experienced Plant Manager based out of Madurai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Hindustan Unilever Global Group:
Hindustan Unilever Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Kaizen

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hindustan Unilever Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
